title: The Parliament (Prevention of Disqualification) Act, 1959
full_text: The Parliament (Prevention of Disqualification) Act, 1959 संसद् (निरर्हता निवारण) अधिनियम,1959 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195910 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 1959-04-04 Act Year: 1959 Short Title: The Parliament (Prevention of Disqualification) Act, 1959 Hindi Title: संसद् (निरर्हता निवारण) अधिनियम,1959 Long Title: An Act to declare that certain offices of profit under the Government shall not disqualify the holders thereof for being chosen as, or for being, members of Parliament. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 04-04-1959 Last Updated: 18-02-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Parliament (Prevention of Disqualification) Act, 1959 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Certain offices of profit not to disqualify. Section 4. Temporary suspension of disqualification in certain cases. Section 5. Repeals. Schedule 1.
